mapper.insert: insert into kb_chunks (id, document_id, chunk_index, content, metadata) values (#{id}, #{documentId}, #{chunkIndex}, #{content}, cast(#{metadataJson} as jsonb))
mapper.select: select c.id, c.document_id, c.chunk_index, c.content, cast(c.metadata as text) as metadata_json, c.created_at, d.name as document_name from kb_chunks c join kb_documents d on c.document_id = d.id where d.base_id = #{baseId} and c.content ilike '%' || #{queryText} || '%' order by d.created_at desc, c.chunk_index asc limit #{topK}
